title: Chirita asperifolia

Chirita asperifolia, like its relatives, belongs to the order Lamiales. The family Gesneriaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, with Chirita asperifolia being part of the subfamily Didymocarpoideae. The classification of Chirita asperifolia reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plant species within the Gesneriaceae family.
